description: Universal ASIO driver (KoordASIO). Installs to Program Files and registers the driver system-wide.
notes: This manifest only automates the official installer. The ASIO driver and KoordASIO Control install under %ProgramFiles%\KoordASIO (not under the Scoop app directory).
UAC/admin may be required. Uninstall removes the driver via the vendor uninstaller under that folder.

uninstaller.script: $pf = [Environment]::GetFolderPath('ProgramFiles'); $d = Join-Path $pf 'KoordASIO'; $u = Get-ChildItem $d -Filter 'unins*.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -ne $u) { Start-Process $u.FullName -ArgumentList '/VERYSILENT','/SUPPRESSMSGBOXES','/NORESTART' -Wait } else { warn 'KoordASIO uninstaller not found; remove manually from Program Files if needed.' }
